topics.title: Engagement Tapes and Marriage Advice
topics.summary: The studio reviews past recordings of the host's aggressive advice against marriage while discussing his recent engagement and a colleague's reaction to it.

topics.title: Bill Cosby and Celebrity Media
topics.summary: The studio discusses the hypocrisy of Bill Cosby’s public persona versus his legal allegations while also touching on personal reactions to media portrayals and celebrity endorsements.

topics.title: Artie's Career and Broadcasting School Experience
topics.summary: The studio features a caller named Artie who recounts his journey from being a student at the Connecticut School of Broadcasting to becoming a radio personality.

topics.title: Hunting Culture and Airplane Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores the ethics of hunting, the logistics of deer farming, and a recurring story about a comedian falling asleep on an airplane.

topics.title: Engagement Ring Details and Wedding Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses the intricate design of Beth's engagement ring, her plans for their wedding celebration, and the practicalities of wedding gifts.

topics.title: Music Special and Studio Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming music special, various guest performances including tracks by Kevin Cronin and Gram Nash, and behind-the-scenes stories involving Green Day.

topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Industry Conflicts
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of radio programming, including a history of professional friction with specific musical acts and the impact of the show's reach on its audience.

topics.title: Radio Show Contract Negotiations
topics.summary: The studio records a heated confrontation regarding contract negotiations, payment disputes, and the professional viability of a radio show.

topics.title: Joan Rivers on Marriage and Mortality
topics.summary: The studio features Joan Rivers discussing her past marriages, her collection of celebrity ashes, and her views on mortality while engaging in a comedic exchange about engagement rings.

topics.title: Anna Nicole Smith and Celebrity Relationships
topics.summary: The studio discusses the tragic death of Anna Nicole Smith, her legal battles, and various anecdotes regarding celebrity dating and personal experiences with fame.

topics.title: Joan Rivers and Celebrity Culture
topics.summary: The studio features Joan Rivers discussing her personal life, celebrity interactions, and the evolution of comedy in the entertainment industry.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Hollywood Rumors
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where the hosts evaluate various celebrity news stories, including rumors involving Will Smith, Brad Pitt, Michael Jackson, and Matthew Perry.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Matthew Perry, Michael Jackson, and Brad Pitt before transitioning into a debate regarding Sal's prank calls and Howard's personal frustrations with his marriage.

topics.title: Marriage Dynamics and Relationship Advice
topics.summary: The studio explores themes of marital discord, personal accountability in relationships, and advice regarding finding balance when a partner dominates one's life.

topics.title: Political News and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio covers topics ranging from personal anecdotes about sexual encounters and drug use among teenagers to political updates on the presidency, international relations with Russia and North Korea, and a critique of Rush Limbaugh's commentary on Barack Obama.

topics.title: Homophobia in Sports and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a former basketball player's comments on homophobia, the historical efforts of Anne Frank's father to secure a visa, Sharon Stone's recent appearance, legal disputes over Anna Nicole Smith's remains, and upcoming comedy tours.
